children.customText:
function()
    if aura_env.state and aura_env.state.tooltip2 then
        if not aura_env.maximaleValue  or aura_env.maximaleValue < aura_env.state.tooltip2 then 
            aura_env.maximaleValue = aura_env.state.tooltip2 
        end
        aura_env.region:SetDurationInfo(aura_env.state.tooltip2, aura_env.maximaleValue,true) 
    end
    return WeakAuras.EJIcons.enrage
end

function()
    if aura_env.state and aura_env.state.tooltip1 then
        if not aura_env.maximaleValue or aura_env.state.tooltip1 > aura_env.maximaleValue then 
            aura_env.maximaleValue = aura_env.state.tooltip1 
        end
        aura_env.region:SetDurationInfo(aura_env.state.tooltip1, aura_env.maximaleValue,true) 
    end
end

function()
    if aura_env.states and aura_env.states[1] and aura_env.states[1].expirationTime and aura_env.states[2] and aura_env.states[2].expirationTime then
        return aura_env.states[1].expirationTime<aura_env.states[2].expirationTime
    end
end

children.customText:
function()
    if aura_env.state and aura_env.state.tooltip1 then
        if not aura_env.maximaleValue or aura_env.maximaleValue == 0 or aura_env.maximaleValue < aura_env.state.tooltip1 then 
            aura_env.maximaleValue = aura_env.state.tooltip1 
        end
        aura_env.region:SetDurationInfo(aura_env.state.tooltip1, aura_env.maximaleValue,true) 
    end
end

function(s,e,unit,castGUID,spellID,_,_,_,_,UnitGUID)
    
    if e == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_START" and spellID == 333861 then    
        s[""] = {
            duration = 12,
            expirationTime = GetTime()+12,
            progressType = "timed",
            autoHide = true,
            changed = true,
            show = true,
            
        }
        return true
    end
    if e== "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" and castGUID == "UNIT_DIED" then
        if UnitGUID then
            local _,_,_,_,_,npc_id,_ = strsplit("-",UnitGUID);
            if s[""] and (npc_id == 167533 or npc_id == 167536) then
                s[""] = {
                    show = false,
                    changed = true,
                    
                }
                return true
            end
            
        end
        
    end
    
end

        }

function(s,waevent,unit, castGUID, spellID)
    if spellID == 328450 then
        s[""] = {
            duration = 3.1,
            expirationTime = GetTime()+3.1,
            progressType = "timed",
            autoHide = true,
            changed = true,
            show = true,
        }
        return true
    end

function(s,e,...)
    if e == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED" and select(3,...) == 319685 then
        local amount = 0
        for unit in WA_IterateGroupMembers() do
            if UnitExists(unit) and not UnitIsDeadOrGhost(unit) then
                amount = amount +1 
            end
            
        end
        
        s[""] = {
            progressType = "static",
            changed = true,
            show = true, 
            value = amount,
            total = amount,
            stacks = amount
        }
        return true
    elseif e == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" then
        local spellId = select(12,...)
        if spellId == 330468 or spellId == 319687 or spellId == 319688 then
            if s[""] then
                s[""].value = s[""].value - 1
                s[""].stacks = s[""].stacks - 1
                if s[""].value == 0 then
                    s[""].show = false
                end
                s[""].changed = true
                return true
            end
            
        end
        
    end
    
    
end

function(s,e,unit,powerType,spellId)
    if unit == "boss1" then
        if e == "UNIT_POWER_UPDATE" then
            if not s[""] then
                local calculatedDuration = (100-UnitPower(unit))/3 + 1.3
                s[""] = {
                    duration = calculatedDuration,
                    expirationTime = GetTime()+calculatedDuration,
                    progressType = "timed",
                    autoHide = true,
                    changed = true,
                    show = true,
                }
                return true
            else
                local calculatedDuration = (100-UnitPower(unit))/3 + 1.3
                if s[""].expirationTime-GetTime() ~= calculatedDuration then
                    s[""].expirationTime = GetTime()+calculatedDuration
                    s[""].changed = true
                    return true
                end
                
            end
        elseif e == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED" and spellId == 322895 or spellId == 322903 then
            if s[""] then
                s[""].show = false
                s[""].changed = true
                return true
            end
            
        end
    end
    
end

function(s,event,unit,guid,spellID)
    if spellID == 327811 then
        s[""] = {
            duration = 19,
            expirationTime = GetTime()+19,
            progressType = "timed",
            autoHide = true,
            changed = true,
            show = true,
            
        }
    elseif spellID == 331401 then
        s[""] = {
            
            changed = true,
            show = false,
            
        }
    end
    return true
end

function(s,e,unit,powerType,spellId)
    if e == "UNIT_POWER_UPDATE" then
        if unit then 
            local guid = UnitGUID(unit)
            if guid then
                local _,_,_,_,_,npc_id,_ = strsplit("-",guid)
                if npc_id and npc_id == "162133" then
                    if not s[""] then
                        local calculatedDuration = (100-UnitPower(unit))/3 + 0.8
                        s[""] = {
                            duration = calculatedDuration,
                            expirationTime = GetTime()+calculatedDuration,
                            progressType = "timed",
                            autoHide = true,
                            changed = true,
                            show = true,
                        }
                        return true
                    elseif s[''] then
                        local calculatedDuration = (100-UnitPower(unit))/3 + 0.8
                        if s[""].expirationTime-GetTime() ~= calculatedDuration then
                            s[""].expirationTime = GetTime()+calculatedDuration
                            s[""].changed = true
                            return true
                        end
                        
                    end
                end
            end
            
        end
    elseif e == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED" and spellId == 331401 or spellId == 324103 then
        if s[""] then
            s[""].show = false
            s[""].changed = true
            return true
        end
        
    end
    
end

children.customText:
function( _, _,p, ...)
    if aura_env.config["timerEnabled"] then
        return p
    end
end

trigger.custom:
function(s, e,...)
    local _, castGUID, spellid = ...
    if e == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED" and spellid == 328400 then
        
        s[""] = {
            duration = 11,
            expirationTime = GetTime() + 11,
            progressType = "timed",
            autoHide = true,
            changed = true,
            show = true,
            stacks = 8
        }
        
        aura_env.guidList = {}
        return true
    elseif s[""] and spellid == 329163 and (e == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED"or e == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_STOP") and not aura_env.guidList[castGUID] then
        
        
        s[""].stacks = s[""].stacks-1
        s[""].changed = true
        
        if s[""].stacks < 1 then
            s[""].show = false
            s[""].changed = true    
        end
        aura_env.guidList[castGUID] = true
        return true
    end
    
end

children.customText:
function()
    if aura_env.AmbushCounter then
        return aura_env.AmbushCounter
    end
    
end

function()
    if aura_env.states[2] and aura_env.states[2].tooltip1 then
        if not aura_env.maximaleValue or aura_env.maximaleValue == 0 or aura_env.maximaleValue < aura_env.states[2].tooltip1 then 
            aura_env.maximaleValue = aura_env.states[2].tooltip1
        end
        aura_env.region:SetDurationInfo(aura_env.states[2].tooltip1, aura_env.maximaleValue,true) 
    end
    
    return WeakAuras.EJIcons.interrupt 
    
end

trigger.custom:
function(allstates, event, unit,castGuid,ZauberID)    
    if event == "UNIT_TARGET"
    and unit
    and UnitExists(unit)
    and not UnitIsUnit(unit.."target", "player")
    then
        local _,_,_,startMS,endMS,_,_,_,spellId = UnitCastingInfo(unit)
        local guid = UnitGUID(unit)
        if spellId
        and spellId == 319941
        and guid
        and not allstates[guid] then
            allstates[guid] = {
                show = true,
                changed =  true,
                progressType = "timed", 
                duration = 5,
                expirationTime = GetTime()+5,
                unit = unit.."target",
                autoHide = true,
            }
            return true
        end
    elseif event == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_START" and ZauberID == 319941 then
        if unit then 
            C_Timer.After(0.5, function() WeakAuras.ScanEvents("JODS_HOA_SHATTERING_LEAP_RECHECK", unit) end)
            
        end
        
        
    elseif event == "JODS_HOA_SHATTERING_LEAP_RECHECK" then  
        if unit then
            local guid = UnitGUID(unit)
            if guid
            and not UnitIsUnit(unit, "player")
            then
                if not allstates[guid] then
                    allstates[guid] = {
                        show = true,
                        changed =  true,
                        progressType = "timed", 
                        duration = 4.5,
                        expirationTime = GetTime()+4.5,
                        unit = unit.."target",
                        autoHide = true,
                    }
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

children.customText:
function()
    if WeakAuras.IsOptionsOpen() then return end
    if not aura_env.last or aura_env.last < GetTime() - 1 then
        aura_env.last = GetTime()
        SendChatMessage("{rt7}".. math.floor(aura_env.state.expirationTime - GetTime())  .."{rt7}") -- replace the message as needed
        
    end
end

    end
end

        end
        aura_env.region:SetDurationInfo(aura_env.state.tooltip1, aura_env.maximaleValue,true) 
    end

trigger.custom:
function(s, e, ...)
    if e == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" and ... then
        local _, message, _, srcGUID, _, _, _, destGUID, _, _, _, spellid = ...
        if message == "SPELL_CAST_START" and spellid == 320804 then
            s[srcGUID] = {
                icon = 320804,
                duration = 10,
                expirationTime = GetTime() + 10,
                progressType = "timed",
                autoHide = true,
                changed = true,
                show = true,
            }
            return true
        elseif message == "SPELL_CAST_SUCCESS" and spellid == 320140 and s[destGUID] then
            s[destGUID] = {
                changed = true,
                show = false,
            }
            return true
        end
    end
end

function(allstates, event, unit,castGuid,ZauberID)    
    if event == "UNIT_TARGET"
    and unit
    and UnitExists(unit)
    and not UnitIsUnit(unit.."target", "player")
    then
        local _,_,_,startMS,endMS,_,_,_,spellId = UnitCastingInfo(unit)
        local guid = UnitGUID(unit)
        if (spellId or spellId2)
        and spellId == 320788
        and guid
        and not allstates[guid] then
            allstates[guid] = {
                show = true,
                changed =  true,
                progressType = "timed", 
                duration = 3,
                expirationTime = GetTime()+3,
                unit = unit.."target",
                autoHide = true,
            }
            return true
        end
    end
end

function(s,event,_,subevent,_,_,_,_,_,destGUID,_,_,_,spellID)
    
    if subevent == "SPELL_SUMMON" and spellID == 346381 then
        if not s[""] then
            
            s[""] = {
                duration = 30,
                expirationTime = GetTime()+30,
                stacks = 1,
                progressType = "timed",
                autoHide = true,
                changed = true,
                show = true,
            }
        else
            s[""].stacks = s[""].stacks+1
            s[""].changed = true
            s[""].expirationTime = GetTime()+30
        end
        
        return true
        
        
    elseif subevent == "SPELL_AURA_REMOVED" and spellID == 346296 then
        
        if s[""] then
            
            s[""].stacks = s[""].stacks-1
            if s[""].stacks == 0 then
                s[""].show = false
            end
            s[""].changed = true
            return true 
        end
        
    end
end

function(s,e,unit,powerType,spellId)
    if unit == "boss1" then
        if e == "UNIT_POWER_UPDATE" then
            if not s[""] then
                local calculatedDuration = (100-UnitPower(unit))/2 + 0.1
                s[""] = {
                    duration = calculatedDuration,
                    expirationTime = GetTime()+calculatedDuration,
                    progressType = "timed",
                    autoHide = true,
                    changed = true,
                    show = true,
                }
                return true
            else
                local calculatedDuration = (100-UnitPower(unit))/2 + 0.1
                if s[""].expirationTime-GetTime() ~= calculatedDuration then
                    s[""].expirationTime = GetTime()+calculatedDuration
                    s[""].changed = true
                    return true
                end
                
            end
        elseif e == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED" and spellId == 346947  then
            if s[""] then
                s[""].show = false
                s[""].changed = true
                return true
            end
            
        end
    end
    
end

children.customText:
function()
    if aura_env.states[2] then 
        return WeakAuras.EJIcons.interrupt,1
    else 
        return WeakAuras.EJIcons.interrupt,0
        
    end
end

trigger.custom:
function(allstates, event, ...)
    if event == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" then
        local timestamp, subEvent, hideCaster, sourceGUID, sourceName, sourceFlags, sourceRaidFlags, destGUID, destName, destFlags, destRaidFlags, spellID, _,_, auraType = ...
        if (subEvent == "SPELL_AURA_APPLIED" or subEvent == "SPELL_AURA_APPLIED_DOSE")
        and spellID == 350804
        and destGUID == WeakAuras.myGUID
        then
            local state = allstates["star"]
            if state then
                state.count = state.count - 1 
                state.changed = true
                if state.count <= 0 then
                    state.show = false
                end
                return true
            end
        elseif subEvent == "SPELL_CAST_SUCCESS" and spellID == 353635 then
            allstates["star"] = {
                show = true,
                changed = true,
                progressType = "timed",
                duration = 25,
                expirationTime = 25 + GetTime(),
                autoHide = true,
                count = 4,
            }
            return true
        end
    end
end

function(allstates,event,unit)
    
    local t1 = WeakAuras.GetTriggerStateForTrigger(aura_env.id, 2)
    if t1 then
        
        if t1[unit] and UnitAffectingCombat(unit) and not allstates[unit] then
            
            allstates[unit] = {
                progressType = "static",
                value = 0,
                total = 5,
                changed = true,
                show = true,
            }
            return true
            
        elseif allstates[unit] and not (t1[unit] and UnitAffectingCombat(unit)) then
            allstates[unit].show = false
            allstates[unit].changed = true
            return true        
        end
    elseif allstates[unit] then
        allstates[unit].show = false
        allstates[unit].changed = true
        return true 
    end
    
    
end

check.value:
function()
    if aura_env.states and aura_env.states[1] and aura_env.states[1].expirationTime and aura_env.states[2] and aura_env.states[2].expirationTime then
        return aura_env.states[1].expirationTime<aura_env.states[2].expirationTime
    end
end

children.customText:
function()
    if WeakAuras.IsOptionsOpen() then
        local spellName = aura_env.GetSpellInfo(352134)
        local vendor = aura_env.spellToNPC[352134]
        return spellName, vendor
    elseif aura_env.state and aura_env.state.unit and aura_env.state.spellId then
        local spellName = aura_env.GetSpellInfo(aura_env.state.spellId)
        local vendor = aura_env.spellToNPC[aura_env.state.spellId]
        return spellName, vendor
    end
end

init.custom:
local Locale = GetLocale()

aura_env.GetSpellInfo = function(spellID)
    if not spellID then
        return nil;
    end
    
    local spellInfo = C_Spell.GetSpellInfo(spellID);
    if spellInfo then
        return spellInfo.name, nil, spellInfo.iconID, spellInfo.castTime, spellInfo.minRange, spellInfo.maxRange, spellInfo.spellID, spellInfo.originalIconID;
    end
end

authorOptions.desc: Sets a limit to the Amount of Spiteful Icons you want to show
authorOptions.name: SpitefulLimit

trigger.custom:
function(s,e,...)
    
    if e == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" then
        local _,_,_,_,_,_,_,destGUID,_,_,_,_ = ...
        if destGUID and s[destGUID] then
            s[destGUID].show = false
            s[destGUID].changed = true
            aura_env.guidList= {}
            return true  
        elseif aura_env.guidList[guid] and aura_env.config["SpitefulLimit"] == 1 then
            for _,v in pairs(s) do
                v.stacks = v.stacks-1
            end
            return true 
        end
        
    elseif e == "FRAME_UPDATE" and (not aura_env.last or aura_env.last < GetTime() - 0.2) then 
        aura_env.last = GetTime()
        local list = C_NamePlate.GetNamePlates() -- get active nameplates
        
        if #list > 0 then
            
            local t2 = WeakAuras.GetTriggerStateForTrigger(aura_env.id, 2) --get debuffed units
            for _, frame in ipairs(list) do
                local unit = frame.namePlateUnitToken
                if unit and UnitExists(unit) and t2[unit] then
                    local guid = UnitGUID(unit)
                    local _,_,_,_,_,npc_id,_ = strsplit("-",guid)
                    if guid and npc_id and not s[guid] and not aura_env.guidList[guid]
                    and npc_id == "174773"
                    and UnitIsUnit(unit.."target", "player")
                    then
                        local max_health = UnitHealthMax(unit);
                        local health = UnitHealth(unit);
                        local healthPercent = health/max_health
                        local calculatedDuration = healthPercent/0.08
                        
                        s[guid] = {
                            duration = calculatedDuration,
                            expirationTime = GetTime()+calculatedDuration,
                            progressType = "timed",
                            autoHide = true,
                            changed = true,
                            show = true,
                            unit = unit,
                            guid = guid,
                            index = 0, 
                            stacks = 0
                        }
                        --this functions as a queue; the oldest clones will be deleted first 
                        local statesAmount = 0
                        for _,v in pairs(s) do
                            statesAmount = statesAmount + 1
                            
                        end
                        if statesAmount > (aura_env.config["SpitefulLimit"]) then 
                            local shortestDuration = math.huge
                            local shortestDurationState = nil
                            for _,v in pairs(s) do
                                local remainingDuration = v.expirationTime-GetTime()
                                if remainingDuration < shortestDuration then
                                    shortestDuration = remainingDuration
                                    shortestDurationState = v.guid
                                end
                            end
                            s[shortestDurationState].show = false
                            s[shortestDurationState].changed = true
                            aura_env.guidList[shortestDurationState] = true
                            if aura_env.config["SpitefulLimit"] == 1 then
                                for _,v in pairs(s) do
                                    v.stacks = v.stacks+1
                                end
                                
                            end
                            
                        end
                        
                        
                        return true
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end
